title: The Christmas Child
content:
"Little one, who straight hast come
    Down the heavenly stair,
    Tell us all about your home,
    And the father there."

    "He is such a one as I,
    Like as like can be.
    Do his will, and, by and by,
    Home and him you'll see."
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, George MacDonald delivers a powerful performance in "The Christmas Child"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
